## Task

Describe the small smart-grid or storage content improvement.

## Reader Value

Explain whether this helps engineers, students, reviewers, or project teams.

## Suggested File

```text
concepts/
glossary/
diagrams/
```

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Acronyms are defined.
- [ ] Claims are scoped and not overstated.
- [ ] The content includes at least one practical project review question.
